name: HRBrain
description: Japanese performance and talent management SaaS with evaluation workflows and integration APIs for kintone/Slack.

seo.title: HRBrain — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: HRBrain: Japanese performance and talent management SaaS with evaluation workflows and integration APIs for kintone/Slack.

when_to_use: Performance evaluation workflow integrated with kintone
Talent management automation for Japanese mid-size companies
Slack-connected HR evaluation nudges and reminders
Structured 1-on-1 and OKR tracking for Japanese teams
Employee development records synced across HR systems

review.verdict: Respectable Japanese HR platform with good integration hooks — largely irrelevant outside Japan.
review.best_for: Japanese companies running formal evaluation cycles who want Slack and Kintone hooks
review.not_for: Global HR teams or anyone standardized on Workday, BambooHR, or Lattice

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
